title: Support - App, user not logged ever, login, Continue, login
scenario: Support section login flow in Poly Studio Mobile app shows white screen with spinner after Lens account login, then displays correct card data
steps: 1. Install the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Complete the login process (enter credentials and authenticate).
expected: Login page opens. User logs into their Lens account. A white screen with the Poly spinner appears. The support card then displays correct data: App version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, and last connected.
